commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: fix(ui): strip ANSI codes in log panel and avoid spurious agent-index…
target.body:
… entries

- Strip SGR and OSC-8 ANSI escape sequences from log messages before rendering so color codes from tool output don't appear raw in the log panel
- Only call ensureAgentIndex() when there are actual tool overrides to persist; findAgentIndex() is sufficient when clearing, preventing empty agent index entries from being created
